steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: The vertex order shows $AB$ corresponds to $QR$, and $AD$ corresponds to $QT$. From the diagram, $AB=12$, $QR=5$, and $QT=10$.

steps.title: Use the scale factor
steps.content:
The scale factor from rectangle QRST to rectangle ABCD is
$$\frac{AB}{QR}=\frac{12}{5}$$
Apply this factor to the corresponding side $QT$:
$$AD=10\cdot\frac{12}{5}=24$$
The answer is B.
